title: Fluffy Onion Tango
description: A tangy and fluffy Portuguese dish featuring onions as the star ingredient, perfect for a solo dinner with low-fat-friendly options.
instructions: Chop the onions into thin slices.
In a small mixing bowl, combine soy sauce, vinegar, and sesame oil. Stir well until the flavors are thoroughly mixed.
Add salt and pepper to taste in the mixture.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add a bit of sesame oil if desired for added flavor.
Place the sliced onions into the hot pan. Sauté the onions gently, turning occasionally to ensure they do not burn.
Pour the soy sauce and vinegar mixture over the onions in the pan, stirring well to coat the onions evenly.
Continue cooking until the onions are golden brown and slightly crispy on top. This should take about 10-15 minutes.
